about.heading: Caio Fochetto
about.p1: Leader in strategy, content and influence with over 15 years connecting brand, culture and results. I transform audience behavior into strategic direction, combining data, creativity and platform intelligence.
about.p2: Focus on brand strategy, team leadership, multi-platform content, performance analysis, partnerships and cultural positioning.
about.p3: I work at the intersection of creativity, data and culture, where global brands need to speak to real communities.

footer.ctaDescription: Open to opportunities in Creator Economy, Performance Marketing and marketing leadership.

history-ae-digital-transformation.title: Digital Platform Monetization: +634% Growth
history-ae-digital-transformation.description: Content distribution and monetization strategy across the three brands' digital platforms, using social channels as revenue and audience growth drivers.
history-ae-digital-transformation.challenge: Expand digital audiences and create new catalog monetization opportunities in an increasingly fragmented consumption landscape, where traditional platforms were losing ground to social.
history-ae-digital-transformation.solution: Strategic use of social channels as distribution platforms — publishing selected episodes and editorial cuts from series within specific time windows to attract new audiences and convert into platform revenue.
insights: Social platforms can be monetization channels as efficient as traditional broadcast
Strategic distribution windows generate organic discovery and revenue simultaneously
Multi-brand management requires distinct editorial identity per channel to avoid cannibalizing audience

formula-e-community.title: Community Building for Formula E: 7% Engagement
formula-e-community.description: Digital and community strategy for the global Formula E championship in Brazil, building local presence for a high-impact international brand.
formula-e-community.challenge: Establish local digital presence and build community relationships for a global championship arriving in Brazil for the first time, without a consolidated fan base.
formula-e-community.solution: Development of digital and community strategy from scratch: positioning, community guidelines, crisis management, always-on content planning and real-time coverage through content and influencers.
insights: Community built with consistency outperforms one-off campaigns in long-term engagement
Real-time activation during events requires robust crisis protocols and agile decision-making
Well-utilized native platform tools can drive significant sales conversion

budweiser-fifa-influencer.title: Influencer Marketing at Scale: 75M Reach at FIFA
budweiser-fifa-influencer.description: Influencer marketing strategy for Budweiser's FIFA Club World Cup activation, combining scale, authenticity and performance through a diversified creator ecosystem.
budweiser-fifa-influencer.challenge: Activate a global sports event with massive cultural relevance, ensuring strong brand presence on digital platforms while balancing scale, authenticity and results — without appearing forced or generic.
budweiser-fifa-influencer.solution: Leadership of influencer marketing strategy with a diversified creator ecosystem: macro influencers for amplification, mid-tier for authentic storytelling and community creators for engagement. Oversight of selection, briefing, co-creation and real-time activation.
insights: Diversified creator ecosystems — macro + mid-tier — deliver scale without sacrificing authenticity
Differentiated roles per creator (amplification, storytelling, engagement) optimize each profile's results
Real-time activation during event peaks is where brand visibility consolidates

betfair-always-on.title: Always-On Strategy for Betfair: 7.5% Engagement
betfair-always-on.description: Always-on influencer marketing strategy for Betfair, master sponsor of Vasco da Gama and Cruzeiro, transforming sponsorship into continuous cultural presence within fan communities.
betfair-always-on.challenge: In a highly competitive sports betting market, Betfair needed to go beyond logo exposure and transform sponsorship into genuine cultural presence — speaking the fans' language, not corporate marketing.
betfair-always-on.solution: Development of always-on strategy with niche creator squads, deeply embedded in each fanbase's culture. The approach combined platform-native content, editorial alignment with the football calendar and real-time performance monitoring via Power BI dashboard.
insights: Niche communities deliver more authenticity and real engagement than mass reach
Culturally embedded creators generate content that doesn't feel like advertising
Data-driven optimization (Power BI) ensures sustained performance instead of isolated spikes
